title: Add YOUTUBE video
user_story:
As an API contributor\
I want to add YOUTUBE videos just by their IDs\
So I don't have to fill out all fields manually
description:
* the existing “create node” functionality is extended (see <https://dennis-gerike.atlassian.net/browse/MCA-4208>)
* there are already multiple VIDEO fields prepared → they have to be filled with real data → data is to be fetched via the official Youtube API
* the YOUTUBE video node is successfully created when the user provided valid data and the video was found in the Youtube API → Status Code \`201\`
* malformed requests are rejected → status code \`400\`
  * same validation rules as before
  * plus: only “youtube“ is a valid value for the `video_provider` field
* requests are rejected when there exists no Youtube video with the provided ID → Status Code \`422\`
* requests are rejected when there already exists a VIDEO node with the provided ID → Status Code \`409\`
